steps.title: Test the choices in each equation
Identify the matching pair
steps.content: The pair $(4,64)$ satisfies both equations. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice A, $(4, 64)$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
